description: baseline: 10 epochs, default config
knn_eval_every_n_epochs 10→1 (was only evaluating at epoch 0)
warmup_epochs 10→2 (LR was still ramping for entire 10-epoch run)
K 1024→4096 (not enough epochs to fill prototypes)
double backbone width: channels (32,64,128,256)→(64,128,256,512)
n_local_crops 4→6 (more diverse views)
n_local_crops 6→8 (diminishing returns)
remove spatial attention block (+0.009 and -4 lines)
base_lr 5e-4→1e-3 (DINO collapse)
K=2048 (too large for 10 epochs, like 4096)
weight_decay_end 0.4→0.1 (high WD helps generalization on MNIST)
head hidden_dim 512→1024 (too much capacity for 10 epochs)
min_lr 1e-6→1e-4 (LR needs to decay for representation quality)
momentum_start 0.996→0.998 (teacher too frozen, collapse)
momentum_start 0.996→0.99 (too aggressive, worse than 0.996)
head n_layers 3→2 (simpler head trains faster in 10 epochs)
head n_layers 2→1 (too simple, loses representational power)
K=2048 with 2-layer head (still hurts)
bottleneck_dim 128→256 (larger bottleneck hurts)
backbone reverted to (32,64,128,256) (wider backbone better)
blocks (1,2,2,1) extra layer2 block (hurts)
gradient_clip_val 3.0→1.0 (tighter clip hurts)
knn_k 20→10 (k=20 is better for current representations)
knn_k 20→30 (k=20 is optimal)
use teacher features for kNN (teacher EMA carries early random-weight bias)
local_crop_scale (0.2,0.5)→(0.1,0.4) (too hard for 10 epochs)
K=512 (worse than K=1024)
TTA: average both global crops for kNN (worse than single crop)
head hidden_dim 512→256 (too small, 512 is sweet spot)
local_crop_scale (0.2,0.5)→(0.3,0.6) (too easy, hurts diversity)
student_temp 0.1→0.07 (too sharp, near collapse)
warmup_epochs 2→1 (too aggressive, 2 is optimal)
asymmetric global blur p=[1.0,0.1] (always-blurry teacher hurts MNIST)
blocks (1,1,2,1)→(1,1,1,1) (extra layer3 block helps)
remove RandomErasing from global (was helping as regularization)
n_local_crops 6→7 (6 is the confirmed sweet spot)
center_momentum 0.9→0.95 (slower center hurts, 0.9 is optimal)
weight_decay_start 0.04→0.0 (some initial WD prevents early collapse)
global_crop_size 28→32 (28 is better despite less clean spatial dims)
fix kNN: temperature-weighted argmax per paper (knn_temperature was defined but unused)
global_crop_scale (0.5,1.0)→(0.4,1.0) (more scale variety hurts)
local_crop_size 14→16 (cleaner power-of-2 dims, more spatial info)
local_crop_size 16→18 (3×3 feature map before pool, more spatial signal)
local_crop_size 18→20 (larger local crops, major gain)
local_crop_size 20→22 (past the peak, 20 is optimal)
local_crop_scale (0.2,0.5)→(0.3,0.6) with 20px crops (original scale is better)
n_local_crops 6→5 with 20px crops (6 is still optimal)
n_local_crops 6→8 with 20px crops (6 confirmed optimal)
avg pool → max pool (peak activation per channel beats average)
concat avg+max pool feat_dim=1024 (larger head input hurts in 10 epochs)
global_crop_scale (0.5,1.0)→(0.6,1.0) (larger teacher crops, more reliable targets)
global_crop_scale (0.6,1.0)→(0.7,1.0) (larger teacher crops, continued gain)
global_crop_scale (0.7,1.0)→(0.8,1.0) (past the peak, 0.7 is optimal)
knn_k 20→10 (k=20 still optimal under new metric)
teacher_temp_warmup_epochs 10→5 (faster warmup hurts, gradual ramp helps)
global_crop_scale (0.7,1.0)→(0.75,1.0) (0.7 is the exact peak)
add RandomErasing p=0.15 to local crops (student needs clean local structure)
blocks (1,1,2,1)→(2,1,2,1) (extra layer1 block hurts, current arch is optimal)
student_temp 0.1→0.09 (paper's 0.1 is optimal, sharper hurts)
knn_temperature 0.07→0.05 (sharper voting hurts, T=0.07 is optimal)
local_crop_scale (0.2,0.5)→(0.2,0.55) (wider max local scale hurts, 0.5 is optimal)
base_lr 5e-4→7e-4 (LR increase hurts, 5e-4 is optimal)
knn_samples 1000→5000 (better class coverage reveals true accuracy was ~0.923 not 0.879)
ReLU→SiLU in backbone (smoother activation improves gradient flow)
local_crop_size 20→21 (SiLU model also peaks at 20)
GELU→SiLU in head (GELU is optimal for projection head, backbone-only SiLU is best)
blocks (1,1,2,1)→(1,1,3,1) (extra layer3 block hurts, (1,1,2,1) is optimal)
gradient_clip_val 3.0→5.0 (looser clip helps SiLU's smoother gradient landscape)
gradient_clip_val 5.0→10.0 (peak is at 5.0, larger clips introduce instability)
n_local_crops 6→7 (6 confirmed optimal even with improved model)
knn_samples 5000→10000 (full val set, most accurate metric, reveals 0.948 quality)
TTA both global crops for kNN (single crop is more consistent, TTA hurts)
center_momentum 0.9→0.85 (faster centering hurts, 0.9 is optimal)
betas (0.9,0.999)→(0.9,0.99) (less 2nd-moment smoothing hurts, 0.999 is optimal)
add SE channel attention to BasicBlock (avg-pool squeeze conflicts with max pool readout)
teacher_temp_start 0.04→0.03 (sharper initial targets, cleaner early learning signal)
teacher_temp_start 0.03→0.025 (trend reversed, 0.03 is the sweet spot)
teacher_temp_end 0.07→0.06 (sharper end hurts, 0.07 is optimal end)
out_dim 1024→2048 (more prototypes not helpful in 10 epochs, 1024 is optimal)
momentum_start 0.996→0.994 (faster EMA hurts, 0.996 is optimal)
bottleneck_dim 128→64 (tighter bottleneck hurts, 128 is optimal)
warmup_epochs 2→3 (longer ramp stabilises training with sharper teacher targets)
warmup_epochs 3→4 (warmup trend continues: longer ramp consistently helps)
warmup_epochs 4→5 (past the peak, 4 is optimal warmup)
teacher_temp_warmup_epochs 10→15 (slower ramp = sharper targets longer, +0.001)
teacher_temp_warmup_epochs 15→20 (past the peak, 15 is optimal)
global_crop_scale (0.7,1.0)→(0.65,1.0) (wider range hurts, 0.7 is still optimal)
knn_temperature 0.07→0.06 (sharper voting works with strong representations)
knn_temperature 0.06→0.05 (overshoots, 0.06 is optimal kNN temperature)
knn_k 20→15 (fewer confident neighbors better with well-separated features)
knn_k 15→10 (too few neighbors, 15 is optimal)
local_crop_scale (0.2,0.5)→(0.15,0.5) (harder local views hurt, 0.2 is optimal)
remove GaussianBlur from local crops (blur helps slightly, keep p=0.3)
DropPath rate=0.1 (too aggressive for 10-epoch training, massive regression)
blocks (1,1,2,1)→(1,2,2,1) (extra layer2 block hurts, arch is optimally sized)
global ColorJitter brightness/contrast 0.4→0.3 (weaker jitter hurts, 0.4 is optimal)
center_momentum 0.9→0.88 (faster center hurts, 0.9 is optimal)
RandomErasing p=0.2→0.3 on global crops (more erasing hurts slightly, 0.2 is optimal)
add RandomRotation(15deg,p=0.5) to global crops (fixed digit orientations, rotation hurts)
n_global_crops 2→3 (more teacher signal doesn't help in 10 epochs, 2 is optimal)
head n_layers 2→3 (deeper head still worse, 2 confirmed optimal even with strong backbone)
student_temp 0.1→0.11 (warmer student hurts, 0.1 is optimal)
base_lr 5e-4→4e-4 (lower LR hurts slightly, 5e-4 is optimal)
switch kNN to train-bank protocol: 60k clean train→10k val queries (paper-correct eval)
global GaussianBlur kernel 3→5, sigma max 1.0→2.0 (stronger blur hurts, original optimal)
RandomErasing p=0.2→0.1 on global crops (less erasing hurts, 0.2 is optimal)
